pr.title: Update Foundry hosted agent protocol payload
pr.author: tommasodotNET

failed_jobs.name: Tests / Acquisition / Acquisition (ubuntu-latest)
failed_jobs.reason: Test failed with 'Text file busy' OS error when trying to execute a mock binary - a race condition in CI unrelated to PR changes (PR only modified Foundry hosting files)

failed_jobs.name: Tests / Cli / Cli (windows-latest)
failed_jobs.reason: Test expected tree-kill escalation within 15s but it took 23.17s - a timing-sensitive test that intermittently fails under CI load. PR only modified Foundry-related files, unrelated to ProcessGuestLauncher.

failed_tests.name: Aspire.Acquisition.Tests.Scripts.PRScriptShellTests.MockGhApiWorkflowWithoutJqFailsLoudly
failed_tests.error: System.ComponentModel.Win32Exception : An error occurred trying to start process '/tmp/aspire-test-dvhDuS/mock-bin/gh' with working directory '/home/runner/work/aspire/aspire/artifacts/bin/Aspire.Acquisition.Tests/Debug/net8.0'. Text file busy
failed_tests.stack_trace:
at System.Diagnostics.Process.ForkAndExecProcess(...)
   at System.Diagnostics.Process.StartCore(ProcessStartInfo startInfo)
   at Aspire.Templates.Tests.ToolCommand.ExecuteAsyncInternal(...) in /_/tests/Shared/TemplatesTesting/ToolCommand.cs:line 156
   at Aspire.Acquisition.Tests.Scripts.PRScriptShellTests.MockGhApiWorkflowWithoutJqFailsLoudly() in /_/tests/Aspire.Acquisition.Tests/Scripts/PRScriptShellTests.cs:line 95
failed_tests.reason: The 'Text file busy' error is a Linux OS-level race condition where a file is being written/compiled while the test tries to execute it. This is a transient CI timing issue unrelated to PR changes which only touch Foundry hosting files.

failed_tests.name: Aspire.Cli.Tests.Projects.ProcessGuestLauncherTests.LaunchAsync_WithGracefulServices_SignalerThrows_StillEscalatesToTreeKill
failed_tests.error: Expected escalation to tree-kill within 15s of Expire() but it took 00:00:23.1730203.
failed_tests.reason: Timing-sensitive test that expects a process tree-kill escalation within 15s but took 23s under CI load. This is an intermittent timing failure. PR only modified Foundry hosting files, not ProcessGuestLauncher.
